positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a whimsical forest scene. The main subject is a cluster of highly detailed, fantastical trees with glowing bioluminescent leaves and branches. Include stylized woodland creatures (foxes, deer, owls) rendered in a minimalist, abstract geometric style, seamlessly integrated into the landscape. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, suitable for an apparel graphic print. Use deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and pops of glowing gold and electric cyan for contrast. High contrast silhouette work, perfect clean lines, designed for linocut or screen printing effect. Vector art style, flat design, negative space emphasized, octane render, 4k, graphic novel aesthetics.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, 3d rendering, messy lines
